ground_truth.title: Machine Learning Development Services
ground_truth.main_content:
Over the last decade, the popularity of machine learning (ML), artificial intelligence (AI), and neural networks have grown significantly. In business areas ranging from healthcare to entertainment, AI and machine learning solutions are used to increase personalization and automate routine tasks. Yellow, a machine learning app development company, is ready to help you take advantage of new market opportunities, achieve your business goals, and reach even greater heights.

Machine learning software development services we provide
If you need machine learning application development to empower your business and explore broader opportunities, here is what Yellow can help you with.

Machine learning development
We offer advanced ML and neural network development for businesses of every scale from small local startups to multinational enterprises. Specialists from Yellow are ready to build a solution that will meet your needs and improve the processes you want to address.

Big data analysis
Working with big data will provide you with definite patterns and valuable insights for your sales and marketing teams. The Yellow team will build a suitable AI and machine learning solution that will analyze raw data accurately.

Predictive algorithms
Predictive analysis is a powerful tool for almost any business. With the help of your existing data and ML models, you can predict the behavior of your customers and market conditions in order to prepare for changes in advance. With the algorithms made by Yellow, you will be able to take a glance into the future.

Computer vision
This service processes real-world photos and videos with capable algorithms. It can be used in a variety of applications and perform countless functions ranging from face detection to vehicle tracking. The combination of proven computer vision tools and top-notch talents at Yellow will create a solution to meet your needs.

Natural language processing (NLP)
Machine learning solutions based on natural language processing algorithms can be used for apps in various industries such as IoT, healthcare, smart homes, and business workflow optimization. We work with text-to-speech and speech-to-text algorithms, text analysis, and translation.

AI-powered chatbots
Chatbots are automated solutions that empower your customer service, facilitate communication with your clients, and boost internal workflow. They can work with the help of scripts, but AI-based solutions are more personalized and efficient. Yellow has more than six years of experience in working with chatbots of various types.

Reasons for choosing AI & ML
AI and machine learning are powerful tools to enhance your business capabilities, facilitate processes, and open up new opportunities in any business area.

Process automation
Machine learning development will help you automate repetitive and routine tasks and lessen the burden on your employees by shifting these tedious operations to digital solutions.

Simplified data processing
Instead of spending a lot of time and resources on manual data analysis, you can get the information and insights you need much faster with less effort.

Personalized customer experience
Provide your customers with superior personalization through insights received with the help of data analysis and advanced machine learning algorithms.

Industry-specific benefits
Fighting financial crimes, predicting marketing trends, managing real estate, and diagnosing diseases can all be assisted by machine learning technologies.

Create a powerful machine learning solution for your business goals

Machine learning app development process
As an ML application development firm, we follow a proven strategy that ensures your project will work as it should.

Discovery
We analyze your business needs, estimate the cost and timeframe of your project, and discuss your expectations about possible results.

Setup work
Next, we create tech stack recommendations, conduct interviews with potential team members, and prepare a project roadmap.

Design
If the visual part is required, in this step, we create a user-friendly and eye-pleasing design to provide a comfortable user experience.

Development
By implementing specific machine learning algorithms, we create an ML model for your data and assess it in a realistic environment.

Quality assurance
When everything is built and reviewed, we implement automated and manual testing to ensure everything works as it should.

Release and support
After finalizing the testing process, we approve the solution with you and provide assistance for maintenance after the release.

ML development services for every industry
We provide custom machine learning development services for the following industries.

Healthcare
Finance
E-commerce
Education
Agriculture
Communication
Fintech
Tourism
Entertainment
Real estate

Why hire Yellow as a machine learning software development firm?

Business-first approach
Your business needs are our top priority. All the processes from research prototyping to testing and deployment are performed to help you reach your goals, not just for show.

Client participation
You will never get left behind in the project. Throughout the whole development process, we provide daily updates about the completed and ongoing tasks.

Product lab
Our team has a product lab where we create our own applications. We apply the experience and knowledge gained from each app’s life cycle to client projects.

AI & ML experience
We have been working with neural networks and machine learning projects for more than seven years and have gained a significant level of expertise in this field.

Data security
At the very beginning of the process, we will sign a non-disclosure agreement with you, so you can rest assured that all your data and business information will stay protected with us.

Extensive support
During all the stages of the ML software development process including post-release, we are ready to answer your questions and help you maintain your AI or ML solution.

Contact Yellow’s team to discuss your machine learning project

Our works
Here are several examples of how machine learning app development services helped our partners.

What people say

Answering questions

How can ML benefit my business?
Machine learning models will help you automate repetitive tasks, provide you with strategic insights for the future, and reduce the workload for your employees.

In which industries is ML a good fit?
Machine learning technologies can benefit all types of businesses ranging from predictive algorithms for financial institutions to natural language processing for communication and entertainment.

How long does it take to build a machine learning solution?
Since every solution has different requirements and specifications, every project will have different time frames, ranging from weeks to months. Feel free to contact us for a detailed estimate.

Can Yellow staff work alongside my own machine learning team?
Yes, we can work together with your team to develop an AI or ML solution.
